A little surprise

Great_day. He was mostly known to be the stoic and no nonsense supreme leader. You never seen him showing any other emotions other than being worried whenever he truly needed. He was always unfazed by even the most gruesome things. Of course, he has done this a lot of times before but you couldn't help but still be concerned. But maybe your thoughts about him were a bit wrong, as you had gone to his residence to meet him, but instead, he gave you a little unexpected surprise...
